title: pyrus malus proles dasyphylla
intro: Pyrus malus proles dasyphylla, also known as the Dasyphylla apple, is a rare and lesser-known variety of apple tree native to certain regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Pyrus malus proles dasyphylla include potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as cardiovascular disease and certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Pyrus malus proles dasyphylla may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
